name: Riso & proteine
description: Bowl proteiche, sazianti e perfette da ufficio.
image_prompt: Elegant Italian lunch box with basmati rice, grilled chicken, zucchini, warm ivory and sage green tones, natural light, premium food photography.

name: Pasta fredda
description: Mediterranea, veloce e facile da trasportare.
image_prompt: Premium cold pasta lunch box with cherry tomatoes, tuna, olives, basil, ivory greige background, sage green accents, natural light.

name: Couscous & verdure
description: Colorato, economico e pronto in pochi minuti.
image_prompt: Colorful couscous lunch box with chickpeas, carrots, zucchini and herbs, elegant meal prep composition, warm natural light.

name: Bowl mediterranea
description: Fresca, bilanciata e molto meal prep.
image_prompt: Mediterranean grain bowl with farro, feta, tomatoes, olives and greens, premium lunch box, ivory greige sage palette.

name: Vegetariana smart
description: Legumi, cereali e verdure in versione glamour.
image_prompt: Vegetarian lunch box with legumes, rice, tofu, vegetables and herbs, clean premium food app style, sage green and ivory tones.

name: Meal prep box
description: Organizzata, pratica e pronta per la settimana.
image_prompt: Elegant weekly meal prep boxes with balanced Italian lunches, organized layout, warm ivory and greige background, natural light.

name: Insalata proteica
description: Leggera ma saziante, buona anche fredda.
image_prompt: Protein salad lunch box with eggs, chicken, greens, seeds and lemon dressing, elegant food photography, sage green tones.

name: Wrap integrale
description: Compatto, veloce e perfetto da portare via.
image_prompt: Whole wheat wrap lunch box cut in halves with fresh vegetables and protein filling, premium casual food app aesthetic.

name: Gourmet light
description: Più curata, elegante e bella da vedere.
image_prompt: Gourmet light Italian lunch box with refined composition, fresh ingredients, elegant plating, ivory greige sage palette.
